title: Guild of Glorious Mercenaries
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Guild of Glorious Mercenaries''' was just one of many guilds among the [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] population. It served as a bounty hunter guild in the [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]] system. While the guild had no authority beyond Wroona, members normally helped other members that they met outside their home system.

[[Nell Indigo]] was a member of this guild.

==Sources==
